title: Importing Pest Control Products - Canada.ca
content:
## Importing pest control products
All pesticides imported into Canada must meet Canadian standards, in other words, be regulated under the Pest Control Products Act ( PCPA ) , and bear the Canadian label. Before products are approved for the Grower Requested Own Use ( GROU ) program they are evaluated by scientists to identify if any chemical differences may lead to increased health or environmental risks.
- Grower Requested Own Use Program
- Fact Sheet on Requirements for the Commercial Importation of Pest Control Products
